name: Hotel Abhi ruchi
about: Hotel Abhi ruchi serves authentic Andhra cuisine with traditional recipes, fresh ingredients, and the real flavors of the region—every meal crafted to taste like home.
address: 103, Sri Sai Enclave, PJR Nagar, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500032, India
working_hours:
Tuesday – Sunday: 11 AM – 11 PM
Monday: First half closed (5 PM – 11 PM)

hero_slides.title: Welcome to Hotel Abhi ruchi
hero_slides.subtitle: Real taste of andhra — spices, soul, and tradition on every plate.

hero_slides.title: Signature Dum Biryani
hero_slides.subtitle: Slow-cooked layers of fragrant rice and authentic Andhra masala.

hero_slides.title: Dine In or Pickup
hero_slides.subtitle: Enjoy at our restaurant or order fresh food ready for pickup.

hero_slides.title: Fresh. Hot. Homestyle.
